title: Utility Commands
description: A Forge mod that adds a variety of new useful commands.
body:
### **Utility Commands**

This mod adds two commands so far. These are the /nogravity and /oxygen command. See how to use each of them below.

 

**/nogravity**

Makes the selected targets have no gravity.

Syntax: /nogravity <target> <boolean>
Example: /nogravity @p true


**/oxygen**

The bubbles that appear when you're underwater is the oxygen bar. Control this value with this command.

Syntax: /oxygen <target> <oxygenLevel>

Example: /oxygen @p 10

 

If you have any new command ideas, suggest them here: https://discord.gg/s7xYjBWDu4

 

By RoCris
